safety_use_cases.label: Material handling and ergonomics risk detection
safety_use_cases.description: Detect and reduce material handling injuries and ergonomic risks (e.g., improper bends, overreach, handling heavy scrap bins or beams) before someone gets hurt.

evidence.quote: But no, our number one injury this year, and it kind of holds true since I've been here for several years now, is material handling.

evidence.quote: So it's not so much about the war, it's about the rule, right? So an ergonomic, improper bend is an improper bend, an overreach is an overreach.

evidence.quote: They're all metal that this woman is handling.

safety_use_cases.label: Walking under suspended loads detection
